allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d[''''trades''''][0], indent=2\)\); print\(f''''Total: {len\(d[trades]\)} trades''''\)")
Bash(sed -i '/slope_buy !== null && slope_buy > -0.5/a\\   \\&\\& drsi_h1 !== null \\&\\& Math.abs\(drsi_h1\) < 6' scripts/backtest_audit.mjs)
Bash(sed -i '/slope_sell !== null && slope_sell < 0.5/a\\   \\&\\& drsi_h1 !== null \\&\\& Math.abs\(drsi_h1\) < 6' scripts/backtest_audit.mjs)
Bash(sed -i 's/if \(isM5Contrary\(r, match.side\)\) continue;/\\/\\/ if \(isM5Contrary\(r, match.side\)\) continue;/' scripts/backtest_audit.mjs)
Bash(sed -i 's/if \(isM5Overextended\(r, match.side\)\) continue;/\\/\\/ if \(isM5Overextended\(r, match.side\)\) continue;/' scripts/backtest_audit.mjs)
Bash(sed -i 's/\\/\\/ if \(isM5Contrary\(r, match.side\)\) continue;/if \(isM5Contrary\(r, match.side\)\) continue;/' scripts/backtest_audit.mjs)
Bash(sed -i 's/\\/\\/ if \(isM5Overextended\(r, match.side\)\) continue;/if \(isM5Overextended\(r, match.side\)\) continue;/' scripts/backtest_audit.mjs)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mw=d.get\('marketWatch',[]\); fr=[r for r in mw if r.get\('symbol'\)=='FRANCE_40']; print\(json.dumps\(fr[0],indent=2\) if fr else 'NOT FOUND'\)")
